allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('name',''\), d.get\('version',''\), d.get\('description',''\)[:80]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('name:', d.get\('name'\)\); print\('version:', d.get\('version'\)\); print\('desc:', d.get\('description',''\)\); bin=d.get\('bin',{}\); print\('bin:', bin\)")
